task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the main dashboard tiddler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler with the exact title 'Active Guidelines Search' is visible in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the tiddler has the correct tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tag pill labeled 'Dashboard' is visible at the top of the 'Active Guidelines Search' tiddler.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a text input field for searching.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input box is rendered inside the body of the 'Active Guidelines Search' tiddler.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a reset button.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clickable button (e.g., labeled 'Reset', 'Clear', or an icon) is visible next to or near the search input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that search results are displayed as clickable links.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dynamic list of tiddler titles formatted as clickable links is visible below the search input and reset button.

task_completion.description: Verify the underlying wikitext uses the correct state tiddler and filter logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler's edit mode wikitext, look for an input widget bound to '$:/state/guideline-search', a button widget that clears it, and a list widget with a filter containing 'tag[ClinicalGuideline]', 'tag[Active]', and exclusions for archived/meeting minutes (e.g., '!tag[Archived]').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser with the tiddler editor open, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the search dashboard is genuinely rendered by TiddlyWiki.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input field, button, and list should look like standard TiddlyWiki UI elements, not a mocked static HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly editing backend files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using terminal text editors (like nano or vim) to manually write .tid files into the TiddlyWiki directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tiddler title is exactly 'Active Guidelines Search' and it must have the tag 'Dashboard'. The state tiddler used for the search input binding must be '$:/state/guideline-search'. The filter logic must target tiddlers tagged both 'ClinicalGuideline' and 'Active', while explicitly excluding meeting minutes and archived guidelines.
